title: MapLock+
description: Adds map locking/unlocking. This protects it from being copied.
body:
## Features - **Lock Maps** - Prevent your maps from being copied - **Owner-Only Unlock** - Only the map owner can unlock it - **Anonymous Mode** - Lock maps without revealing your name --- ## Commands | Command | Description | |---------|-------------| | `/maplock` | Lock/unlock the map you're holding | | `/maplock anon` | Lock map anonymously (hides owner name) | | `/maplock reload` | Reload configuration | **Aliases:** `/ml`, `/lockmap` --- ## How It Works 1. **Hold a filled map** in your main hand 2. Type `/maplock` to lock it 3. The map now displays a "locked" indicator in its lore 4. Nobody can copy this map through any crafting method 5. Only you can unlock it by using `/maplock` again --- ## Permissions | Permission | Description | Default | |------------|-------------|---------| | `maplock.use` | Lock and unlock maps | Everyone | | `maplock.reload` | Reload config | OP | | `maplock.*` | All permissions | OP | ---
Config ``` # ================================================ # MapLockPlus Plugin Configuration # ================================================ # Configuration file for MapLockPlus plugin # # Color support: use & for color codes # Example: &a - green, &c - red, &7 - gray # ================================================ # Language settings language: en messages: players-only: "&cThis command can only be used by players!" must-hold-map: "&cYou must hold a filled map to use this command!" not-owner: "&cYou are not the owner of this map! Only the owner can unlock it." unlocked: "&aMap unlocked! It can now be copied." locked: "&aMap locked! It can no longer be copied." only-you-unlock: "&7Only you can unlock this map." cannot-copy: "&cYou cannot copy a locked map!" config-reloaded: "&aConfig successfully reloaded!" no-permission: "&cYou don't have permission to use this command!" # ================================================ # LOCKED MAP LORE SETTINGS # ================================================ lore: # Show owner name for regular lock? show-owner: true # Owner line format (%owner% will be replaced with player name) owner-format: "&7Owner: &f%owner%" # ===== LORE FOR /maplock (with owner name) ===== locked-map: - "" - "&c🔒 Locked Map 🔒" - "" # ===== LORE FOR /maplock anon (WITHOUT name) ===== anonymous-map: - "" - "&c🔒 Anonymous Locked Map 🔒" - "" - "&7Owner: &f???" # ================================================ # УКРАЇНСЬКА ВЕРСІЯ / UKRAINIAN VERSION # ================================================ # Скопіюйте та замініть значення вище для української мови # Copy and replace values above for Ukrainian language # # language: uk # # messages: # players-only: "&cЦю команду можуть використовувати тільки гравці!" # must-hold-map: "&cВи повинні тримати заповнену карту, щоб використати цю команду!" # not-owner: "&cВи не власник цієї карти! Тільки власник може її розблокувати." # unlocked: "&aКарту розблоковано! Тепер її можна копіювати." # locked: "&aКарту заблоковано! Її більше не можна копіювати." # only-you-unlock: "&7Тільки ви можете розблокувати цю карту." # cannot-copy: "&cВи не можете копіювати заблоковану карту!" # config-reloaded: "&aКонфіг успішно перезавантажено!" # no-permission: "&cУ вас немає прав для використання цієї команди!" # # lore: # show-owner: true # owner-format: "&7Власник: &f%owner%" # # locked-map: # - "" # - "&c🔒 Заблокована мапа 🔒" # - "" # # anonymous-map: # - "" # - "&c🔒 Анонімна заблокована мапа 🔒" # - "" # - "&7Власник: &f???" # # ================================================ ```
